name: @docutray/cli
description: Official DocuTray CLI — AI-powered document processing from the command line
author: DocuTray

scripts.docs:generate: oclif readme --multi --output-dir docs/commands && sed -i '' 's/^# Command Topics/## Command Topics/' README.md

steps.description: Execute and monitor document processing steps. Steps are reusable processing pipelines that can be applied to documents for extraction, transformation, and validation.

types.description: Manage document types (extraction schemas). Document types define the fields and structure that DocuTray extracts from documents during conversion.
